title: Chana Masala
description: A popular North Indian dish made with chickpeas in a rich and creamy tomato-based sauce. This recipe is a classic comfort food that is easy to make and full of flavor.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until they are translucent.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the chickpeas, chana masala, and water (if using).
Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over basmati rice or with naan bread.
